- Prompt: Design an AI-generated image depicting a stylish individual in trendy streetwear, surrounded by vibrant street art and graffiti in a bustling urban cityscape.

selfie of salma abu dief found on instagram, party, beautiful 25 young woman, scarf on head, rounded face, background charming blurred detail, 1girl, light leaks, sunset, sharp eyes, neuromancer, street samurai, cyberpunk city background, megacity, gorgeous view, depth, painted by seb mckinnon, high detail, painted by greg rutkowski, trending on artstation

Prompt: Generate an AI-generated image inspired by a selfie of Salma Abu Dief found on Instagram. Salma is a beautiful 25-year-old woman, wearing a scarf on her head, with a rounded face and sharp eyes. The image should capture her in a party setting, with a charmingly blurred background featuring light leaks and a sunset. Set the scene in a cyberpunk city, resembling a megacity, with a stunning view and depth. Incorporate elements of the Neuromancer novel and the street samurai aesthetic. The artwork should have high detail and bear the stylistic touch of renowned artists, Seb McKinnon and Greg Rutkowski, ensuring it reflects the latest trends on platforms like ArtStation.

Prompt: Create an AI-generated image featuring a full-body person in a captivating and eye-catching scene. The character should have a unique appearance, such as vibrant hair color or unusual accessories. For the background, imagine a surreal landscape immersed in a twilight atmosphere, with floating islands, glowing plants, and sparkling waterfalls. Incorporate trending details like futuristic fashion elements or holographic technology seamlessly integrated into the environment. Ensure that the composition and lighting of the image enhance the overall aesthetic appeal. This image should stand out as a visually stunning, imaginative, and trendsetting creation.
give me a prompts to generate ai image from https://app.leonardo.ai/, the image must be full body person, no deformed eyes, deformed body, deformed hands, creative idea for background

Prompt: Generate an AI-generated image featuring a full-body person with natural-looking proportions and features. Ensuring the person's eyes, body, and hands appear anatomically correct. For the background, imagine a whimsical and enchanting setting, like a mystical forest with towering trees, vibrant flowers, and soft sunlight filtering through the leaves. Add elements of fantasy, such as floating orbs of light or magical creatures, to create an ethereal atmosphere. You can also incorporate trending details like intricate tattoos or intricate patterns on the character's clothing. The focus should be on creating a visually appealing, harmonious image with a touch of magic.
best website to descripe images, and use the descripe as a prompts

One of the best websites to describe images and use the descriptions as prompts is Unsplash (www.unsplash.com). Unsplash offers a vast collection of high-quality, royalty-free images covering various categories. Each image comes with a detailed description that can serve as a starting point for generating prompts for AI image creation. By exploring their diverse image library, you can discover captivating visuals and their corresponding descriptions to inspire your creative endeavors.

GPT-S Description Preview
A woman is swimming underwater with a pink fish in the background. She has long, dark hair that flows around her face and body as she moves through the water. Her eyes are closed, and her lips are slightly parted as if she's taking a deep breath of air. The blue water surrounding her is filled with white circles that create an interesting pattern on the surface. In addition to the woman and fish, there is also a Red Bull logo visible near the top of the image. This picture captures a moment of peacefulness and tranquility beneath the waves, making it perfect for any outdoor or aquatic-themed project.
